goals.title: Separate Baton product development from consumer control planes
goals.objective: Rename the product to Baton and ship clean new-project and adoption payloads centered on an isolated .baton control plane.
goals.context: The stable v0.5.0 adoption copied the source repository into a mature project, conflicted with project identity, scanned ignored vendor trees, and activated contradictory starter state.
goals.resultSummary: The exact unpublished v0.6.0 candidate is complete and independently verified; publication remains behind the separate human Release gate.

goals.title: Give every Baton project a named company that remembers and improves
goals.objective: Create a provider-aware Management-first bootstrap, one project-local company memory, named reusable coworkers, evidence-backed reviews, and bounded role-specific recall.
goals.context: Installation currently leaves task creation and project onboarding manual, while permanent and disposable coworkers lack shared durable identity, user-approved memory, and evidence-backed reuse history.
goals.resultSummary: The unpublished Baton v0.7.0 candidate delivers Management-first bootstrap, project-local company memory, named reusable coworkers, bounded recall, and independently verified migration and rollback; publication remains behind the human Release gate.
